text.title: Provider Deprecation Runbook Procedure
text.summary: 5-phase procedure from deprecation announcement to 100% replacement.

step.name: announce
step.input: provider deprecation notice + replacement model + eval baseline
step.action: Schedule the run; assign owner + on-call; pin deprecation_date.

step.name: canary-1pct
step.action: Flip 1% traffic to replacement. Watch error rate + eval delta for `budget_min` minutes.
step.decision-gate: error_rate <= baseline + 1% AND eval_delta within tolerance else rollback

step.name: ramp-5pct
step.action: Raise to 5% traffic; same observation window.

step.name: ramp-50pct
step.action: Raise to 50% traffic; observation window 2-4x longer.

step.name: cutover-and-record
step.action: Raise to 100%; commit run-record JSON with start/end ts + branches + exceptions.
